## Standing Committee on Health (HESA) Appearance, February 2021
Briefing package for the President of the National Research Council as witness before the Standing Committee on Health (HESA) on February 22, 2021 on the topic of the Emergency Situation Facing Canadians in Light of the Second Wave of the COVID‑19 Pandemic.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: National Research Council Canada
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
